summary: Completed testing of Challenge Reordering feature. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The feature allows admins to reorder challenges using up/down arrow buttons in the Admin panel.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in Stats by Challenge table - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (pre-existing issue from iteration 11)

seed_data_creation: Created test challenge for auto display_order verification (cleaned up after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Challenge reordering feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has POST /api/challenges/reorder endpoint that accepts {ordered_ids: []} and updates display_order. GET /api/challenges and GET /api/challenges/all both return challenges sorted by display_order. Frontend has up/down chevron buttons in ChallengesAdmin component with data-testid='challenge-move-up-{id}' and 'challenge-move-down-{id}'. First challenge's up button and last challenge's down button are properly disabled.

backend.GET_challenges_all_sorted: PASS - Returns challenges sorted by display_order (admin only)
backend.GET_challenges_public_sorted: PASS - Returns active challenges sorted by display_order
backend.POST_challenges_reorder: PASS - Accepts ordered_ids array and updates display_order for each challenge
backend.POST_challenges_auto_order: PASS - New challenges get auto-incrementing display_order
backend.reorder_empty_ids_fails: PASS - Returns 400 when ordered_ids is empty

frontend.up_down_arrows_visible: PASS - ChevronUp/ChevronDown buttons visible for each challenge
frontend.first_up_disabled: PASS - First challenge's up arrow button is disabled
frontend.last_down_disabled: PASS - Last challenge's down arrow button is disabled
frontend.move_down_works: PASS - Clicking down arrow moves challenge down and persists
frontend.move_up_works: PASS - Clicking up arrow moves challenge up and persists
frontend.display_order_shown: PASS - Each challenge shows 'Order: X' in subtitle text
